name: Koa'ki Meiru Hydro Barrier
name_jp: コアキメイル・フルバリア
desc: You can return 1 "Iron Core of Koa'ki Meiru" from your hand to the top of the Deck. If you do, the effect(s) of all face-up Effect Monsters are negated until the Standby Phase of your next turn, except "Koa'ki Meiru" monsters.
mnst_eff: You can return 1 "Iron Core of Koa'ki Meiru" from your hand to the top of the Deck. If you do, the effect(s) of all face-up Effect Monsters are negated until the Standby Phase of your next turn, except "Koa'ki Meiru" monsters.
eff: You can return 1 "Iron Core of Koa'ki Meiru" from your hand to the top of the Deck. If you do, the effect(s) of all face-up Effect Monsters are negated until the Standby Phase of your next turn, except "Koa'ki Meiru" monsters.

action: Places cards from the player's hand on the top of the Deck for cost
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
